basic_details.job_title: DCPU Nalanda Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 30 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Nalanda (DCPU Nalanda)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Nalanda (DCPU Nalanda) Support Person Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website nalanda.nic.in. A total of 30 vacancies have been announced for the Support Person post through the DCPU Nalanda Support Person Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age as on 01-05-2026

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling with three years experience
qualification.details: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling along with three years experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nalanda.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Nalanda Support Person Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCPU Nalanda Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: DCPU Nalanda Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
DCPU Nalanda Support Person Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://nalanda.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Nalanda Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Nalanda Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DCPU Nalanda Support Person posts is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post Graduate degree in Social Work (MSW), Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, or Law. Alternatively, a Graduate degree with a Diploma in Child Rights or Counselling, along with three years of relevant experience, is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Support Person role is between 30 years and 65 years, as of 1st May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 30 vacancies announced for the Support Person position by the District Child Protection Unit Nalanda.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Support Person post will receive Rs. 9000 per POCSO case, with a maximum limit specified.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the DCPU Nalanda Support Person recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Support Person posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Support Person posts will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job for the Support Person post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Nalanda, which is https://nalanda.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. How should I submit the application form?
faq.answer: The application form should be filled carefully and sent along with required documents via Speed Post or Registered Post to the address mentioned in the official notification.
